sections.sectionTitle: A Kipiangsak Khempeuh in Topa Phat Ding

verses.text: Topa phat un. Vantung panin Topa phat un la, a sangna panin amah phat un
Ama vantung mi khempeuh aw, amah phat un. Ama mihonte khempeuh aw, amah phat un
Ni leh kha aw, amah phat un. A taang aksi khempeuh aw, amah phat un
Van sangpente leh vantunga om tuite aw, amah phat un
Topa' min amaute phatsak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thu pia a, amaute a piang hi
Amaute a tawntunga om dingin amah in kipsak a, a palsatloh ding uh thupiakna amah in a bawl hi
Leitung panin Topa phat un, no gulpi liante leh tuipi thuk khempeuh
mei leh gial, tuikhal leh vuk, ama thupiakna a mang huihpi
Amah phat un, no mual liante leh mual neute khempeuh, gah a nei singkungte leh taamtak singkung khempeuh
Gamsate leh innsate khempeuh, a bokvak ganhingte leh a leeng vasate khempeuh
No leitung kumpite leh mihing khempeuh, leitung uliante leh thukhente khempeuh
Nungakte leh tangvalte, teeksiate leh naupangte aw, amah phat un
Topa' min phat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah bek a minlian hi a, ama minthan'na pen leitung leh vantung sangin sangzaw lai hi
Amah in ama mite thahatsak a, ama mi siangthote khempeuh, ama mai-ah a om Israel-te khempeuh in amah phat uh hi. Topa phat un.
